subject: Fw: Bill
body:
What shall we offer him ..he needs to move up salary wise




Thx

G

----- Original Message -----
From: DKIESQ@aol.com <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Wed Dec 19 11:02:18 2007
Subject: Bill

Old Salary - Between $99,000 and $100,000.
Last year's bonus - $8,000
Last Year's profit sharing - $7,000
He pays $60 per pay period for health insurance - $120 per month
He has a 401K that the employer matches 6%
He gets a total of 4 weeks off total including sick time
He claims that on Pillsbury's web-site his employment package is valued at $129,000, including all benefits.
He can't start until January 14, 2008 - wants to give his old employer plenty of notice.  He will come after work and work nights and weekends with Dave.  
 
I told him to work out a transition plan with Dave.
 
I told him that we would e-mail him the details of the offer
 
I will run an oatman check on him today.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
